name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: We made it through the primary!
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=f_L.m_ZNNofBCP.&b=duOXCjYeDWG9fAwhXWFDzQ

Peter

We have made it through the primary and we are onto the general election this November. We came in second place, significantly ahead of the other candidates. I am so proud of our amazing volunteers and donors that helped propel us through a tough primary with several opponents.

Now, the hard work starts. We have eight months to show the citizens of District 32 that the status-quo of career politicians implementing high taxes, over-regulation, open borders, and pandering for votes must come to an end. I want the San Gabriel Valley to prosper under conservative policies that empower the individual and their families, uphold the constitution, and respect our American sovereignty. With how well we have been received in the community on a daily basis, I am more confident than ever that we can get this done.

Join our movement now as we continue the grind to flip this district in favor of The People.

See you soon,

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=f_L.m_ZNNofBCP.&b=duOXCjYeDWG9fAwhXWFDzQ

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626) 214-5406

Donate

name: Warnock for Georgia
subject: re: meeting tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend: Tomorrow morning, we've got a meeting with Reverend Warnock to go over responses from the survey he sent around yesterday - but we noticed we're still missing yours.
---
We mean it when we say that your voice is critical to shaping our strategy in this must-win race. We can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats - but we can't do it without you.
**Please, this is important: Can Reverend Warnock count on you to take just 60 seconds now to share your thoughts? We need to hear from another 24 people by midnight.**
Here's the best link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-op-v1")**
Thank you for taking the time - your feedback really makes a difference.
Warnock for Georgia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock
Date: Wed, Mar 4, 2020
Subject: I need your response, friend

| | |
---
Friend,

It's only been a month since we launched our campaign for U.S. Senate - but already, the momentum behind our fight to flip Georgia blue is _incredible._
While my wealthy opponent is pouring millions of her own fortune into this race to try and buy this seat, I'm running a grassroots campaign that puts _your_ interests, _your_ priorities and _your_ concerns front and center.

**That's why I need to hear from you directly. Your input is critical to making sure we can flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats:** **[Will you take just a moment of your day to let me know what issues matter most to you in this election?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-op-v1")**
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-op-v1")
---
Experts agree that Democrats _can_ take back the Senate in November - and _The Washington Post_ reports that winning in Georgia is key to making that happen.
So to win on Election Day, we've got to have a grassroots team - made up of people like you, friend - fighting alongside us every step of the way. **But with our midnight survey deadline just hours away, I'm missing your response:**

[Please, friend, take our survey so we can craft a winning strategy to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate this November.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-op-v1")
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk98-su-op-v1")
---
Thank you for all that you do.
Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e61a/288179be/aa4b5ec/348edc3e/3995894636/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

Given how important voter turnout is for our prospects in Texas — where we
have a chance to stop Donald Trump and deliver the 38 electoral college
votes to the Democratic nominee AND win a Democratic majority in the state
house in November — I wanted to share some good news with you.

This past Tuesday, nearly 2.1 million Texans voted in our state’s primary.
That is 640,000+ more people than voted in 2016.

Despite the wind and the rain, Texas’ history of voter suppression, the
long lines (voters at TSU in Houston waited SIX HOURS to cast their
ballot!), the people of Texas stepped up to be heard and to be counted.

Democratic Primary Turnout
2016: 1,435,895
2020: 2,076,046+

[1]Texas voters in line.

As a Texan this makes me proud, and as an American who is deeply concerned
about the future of this country this gives me hope. It shows me that the
will, and the numbers, are there to win at least nine more state rep
seats, which would put us in the majority for the first time in twenty
years. And if we build on this by registering more voters, getting more
volunteers in the field and building a true state-wide organizing effort,
we could stop Donald Trump once and forever by winning Texas for the
Democratic nominee. That’s the work that I’m focused on with Powered By
People this year.

I’d love to have your help (and for those who’ve already donated, your
continued support) to do this important work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42400?refcode=ema20200305-80987&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=80987%2E444211%2EYCq-l- ]Can you make a contribution to help Powered By People volunteers
organizing all across the state? Whether you give five or fifty dollars,
everything really helps.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42400?refcode=ema20200305-80987&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=80987%2E444211%2EYCq-l- ]Contribute now

Your donation will help us to recruit and support volunteers to register
new voters, and to turnout existing ones by knocking on their doors.

This kind of direct voter engagement is the single most effective way to
communicate with those who will decide these important elections. I am
confident that if we build a large enough team, we can organize in
critical state house races and across the entire state of Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42400?refcode=ema20200305-80987&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=80987%2E444211%2EYCq-l- ]If you want to be part of this work, make a contribution to Powered By
People now.

Thank you!

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=80987%2E444211%2EYCq-l-

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Texas Battleground HQ -- MJ Hegar
subject: New goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We are kicking off a new stage of our campaign, and that means new goals, too

|
---

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Schumer: "YOU Will Pay The Price!"
body:
OUR Pro-Life values are under attack in Washington! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-x/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,If it weren't captured on video, it might be hard to believe: **Sen. Chuck Schumer threatened two Supreme Court justices over the issue of abortion.****I won't stand for these disgusting attacks on our pro-life values and on our Supreme Court Justices! Will you join me?** [Defend Life and the Supreme Court - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Defend Life and the Supreme Court - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Defend Life and the Supreme Court - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Here's Sen. Schumer's exact quote, with no embellishment or "fake news":
> "I want to tell you, Gorsuch, I want to tell you, Kavanaugh, you have released the whirlwind, and _**you will pay the price**!_ _**You won't know what hit you**_ if you go forward with these awful decisions."
Watch for yourself: [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-i/) In Congress, I will always fight for the pro-life values of the people of southeastern Wisconsin, regardless of threats from unhinged Democrats.If you're with me, I hope you'll [join the fight today](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-u/)!Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S. [Here's the link again](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ndkhiil-ahkdjtlkr-o/) to defend our values and stand up for life in Washington!

name: Jason Yates
subject: LIVE Call with Sarah Huckabee Sanders Today!
body:
Peter,
I’m just following up on an email I sent earlier this week inviting you to the _Vote Your Values_ prayer call **_today, March 6, at 12:15 PM EST_**.
**We are excited to announce a special guest, Sarah Huckabee Sanders.**
She is the former White House Press Secretary, and daughter of Governor Mike Huckabee, My Faith Votes’ Honorary National Chairman.
Together we will discuss how we can encourage Christians to vote for biblical values this election year.
I hope you can join us! We’ve partnered with our friends at _Intercessors for America_ and we are excited to see what God is going to do through His people.
This will be a very unique strategy call. You will not want to miss it. We will not only spend time in prayer, but we will also provide you with guiding prayer principles that you can use between now and November. Imagine the impact we can have when Christians unite in prayer for our nation.
**Join us and Sarah Huckabee Sanders today at 12:15 PM EST by calling (712) 775-7430 (no code needed) or join us on a live stream by going to[Facebook LIVE](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200306com01&n=1) or our [YouTube Channel](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_tu0pvdJpJuWYdpUxYRHnw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200306com01&n=2).**
Please don’t miss it. This will be some of the most valuable time you spend, praying with others to keep faith at the heart of America.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200306com01&n=3)
P.S. Can’t make the call? Be sure to watch the broadcast replay at _Intercessors for America_[here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=BOom2RdfI6ug6DAjcIV3nC78xe4Oy19KPiTxD4lWwhk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200306com01&n=4).
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200306com01&n=5).

name: Team Booker
subject: The only difference between us and our Democratic opponent...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
#
Last night we had a major candidate forum with the Democrats who want to take on Mitch McConnell in the general election.
**Charles absolutely nailed it.** The media and establishment would have you believe this primary is locked up and over. But last night shows it’s far from it.
**Here’s the reality** : the only difference between the establishment’s favorite pick and Charles is money — they’ve got lots of it on their side. That’s why we need your help to put a progressive like Charles on the ballot in November.
[**Can you make a $5 donation to give Charles Booker a chance to compete with our well-funded opponents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15784433/166934123/957734365?refcode=em20200306&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzcxZmFkNi1jYTVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Fa5wCuwhssT81hNI2FcnXc01jly3ifWkrfkRQZMs5E=)

**Charles was**** _by far_****the most engaging candidate on stage.** He wasn’t giving canned responses or pivoting to tired talking points, but speaking from the heart.
* He talked about losing four cousins to murder and gun violence.
* He talked about the need for Medicare for All so people don’t have to choose between paying their hospital bills and feeding their children.
* He talked about passing a Green New Deal to tackle the climate crisis.

We need a candidate who believes in a progressive agenda, who has a consistent record, and who works with us to build a grassroots movement. If we put up a milquetoast Democratic nominee to go up against Mitch McConnell in November, we’re setting ourselves up to lose _again_.
[**Please make a $5 contribution right now if you want to help elect Charles and defeat Mitch in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15784437/166934127/957734365?refcode=em20200306&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzcxZmFkNi1jYTVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Fa5wCuwhssT81hNI2FcnXc01jly3ifWkrfkRQZMs5E=)
We rely on contributions from donors like you to fund our campaign. So thank you, from the bottom of our hearts, for believing in us and investing in us. It couldn’t be more important for Kentucky and this country.
\- Team Booker

body:

| Hello!

As we enter the month of March, things are really picking up on the campaign trail. This race is heating up and [we need your help!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKxZrYb4MlSc5I3XEvZojQoVy3UETiYy8QjWPJIoP-NzMRXOwy3AJwXrP0cH_YmFnF4spetbjE8e7OP--Y-g23KcFyIQxP_CzUIpbeVSGK5zVmJuV1BWC0U2Lo6NB4tKZWsdlmmu2Hx5ceq-26ZLWYl_gwUUjNQ5RCDMVDCPc9k=&c=ynln3KLdkZS-bKJfUPzcoBRTSLEz9TPFzvOky6F0zv6R8SINs3vc8A==&ch=hXNnkh8rHS2f2iN-5vjiHa3t9KLb3U6u5MlBHGTUgLdUA_rOYQm9CQ==)
Our volunteers are amazing and have done incredible work over the course of this campaign. [I'd love for you to join them](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKxZrYb4MlSc5I3XEvZojQoVy3UETiYy8QjWPJIoP-NzMRXOwy3AJwXrP0cH_YmFnF4spetbjE8e7OP--Y-g23KcFyIQxP_CzUIpbeVSGK5zVmJuV1BWC0U2Lo6NB4tKZWsdlmmu2Hx5ceq-26ZLWYl_gwUUjNQ5RCDMVDCPc9k=&c=ynln3KLdkZS-bKJfUPzcoBRTSLEz9TPFzvOky6F0zv6R8SINs3vc8A==&ch=hXNnkh8rHS2f2iN-5vjiHa3t9KLb3U6u5MlBHGTUgLdUA_rOYQm9CQ==) knocking on doors, putting out signs, making phone calls, and helping to spread our pro-business, pro-family conservative message.
We'll have plenty of volunteer opportunities over the next couple of months, and I ask that you donate just a couple hours of your time. You really can make a difference in this race! So if you have not filled out our volunteer form, you can [follow this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKxZrYb4MlSc5I3XEvZojQoVy3UETiYy8QjWPJIoP-NzMRXOwy3AJwXrP0cH_YmFnF4spetbjE8e7OP--Y-g23KcFyIQxP_CzUIpbeVSGK5zVmJuV1BWC0U2Lo6NB4tKZWsdlmmu2Hx5ceq-26ZLWYl_gwUUjNQ5RCDMVDCPc9k=&c=ynln3KLdkZS-bKJfUPzcoBRTSLEz9TPFzvOky6F0zv6R8SINs3vc8A==&ch=hXNnkh8rHS2f2iN-5vjiHa3t9KLb3U6u5MlBHGTUgLdUA_rOYQm9CQ==) to do so.
---
| Once you've signed up, we'll be in touch to schedule volunteer times and events that best fit your schedule. I'm excited to have you on our team as we head to victory. Thank you so much in advance for your support!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant
---
| | |
---
| ABOUT MERIDETH
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant grew up here in Oklahoma City working at the family hardware store and lumberyard, where she learned the conservative values of hard work and community. A product of our Oklahoma public schools, Merideth was an award-winning business management consultant before starting her own successful business. A featured keynote speaker on business issues, former U.S. Delegate at the Global Entrepreneurship Summit, and co-founder of a social enterprising company that serves inner-city youth, Merideth has the commitment to community and business experience we need in Washington D.C.
She is 100% pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, pro-border security, and supports President Trump as our duly elected Commander in Chief.

---

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Our Hearts Are With Middle Tennessee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Dear Peter ,
We expected Super Tuesday to be chaotic, but we did not expect the devastation that was inflicted on Middle Tennessee. In the middle of the night, a tornado touched down and caused immense damage to much of Middle Tennessee. Residents in Davidson, Wilson, and Putnam County are dealing with injuries, missing persons and lost loved ones.
Normally, the top portion of this email serves as a letter and an opportunity for us to discuss key political issues or opponent's actions. This week, our letter is dedicated to our Middle Tennessee communities.
We stand with Middle Tennessee during this tragic, heart-wrenching time. No amount of words can lessen the pain and Tennessee's heart will always beat different from this disaster.
We will be with your families and neighbors every step of the way as you heal.
Love and Light,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
- Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
Donate to help relief efforts in Middle Tennessee! [https://www.cfmt.org/story/middle-tennessee-emergency-response-fund/]
REPUBLICANS CONTINUE WITH
SLATE OF HATE HOURS AFTER
TORNADO DEVASTATES
MIDDLE TENNESSEE
Dozens were dead, hundreds were missing, including many children. The legislators' offices were out of power and Middle Tennessee Counties had just filed formal states of emergency. As Tennesseans rallied around our neighbors, Bill Lee and the Republican supermajority decided to resume committee meetings Tuesday and push through permit-less gun carry and their attack on women’s ability to make their own health care decisions.
Lawmakers should have stood with Tennessee communities and families in their time of need; instead, Republican legislators spent their time passing laws to further harm and hurt Tennesseans. [https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/622560315201539/]
https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/622560315201539/ [https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/622560315201539/]
WE MADE HISTORY IN
THE PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY
We applaud each and every one of the 515,425 TN democrats that cast their vote in the 2020 presidential primary - an increase of 38% over 2016.
We thank volunteers, campaign staff, candidates, and county parties for the hours and work put into getting people to the polls.
CONTINUE THE HISTORIC MOMENTUM
ATTEND YOUR COUNTY CONVENTION
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Square%20timeline%20graphic.%20COUNTY%20CONVENTION%20%281%29.png]
You've decided who gets delegates, now, it's time to select which delegates will represent you at the 2020 DNC Convention. It's more important now than ever to get involved in your party!
Visit the TNDP Calendar to find your County Convention! [https://tndp.org/find-an-event/]
CHECK OUT DELEGATE CALCULATIONS
You voted on Tuesday and now, we know who gets Congressional District Delegates. Check out how we calculated that data and which candidates get delegates from which district.
Visit the Delegate Apportionment Calculations [https://s3.amazonaws.com/collective-agency-wp-uploads/wp-content/uploads/sites/5/2020/03/2020-Tennessee-Democratic-Delegate-Apportionment-Calculations.pdf] ! [https://s3.amazonaws.com/collective-agency-wp-uploads/wp-content/uploads/sites/5/2020/03/2020-Tennessee-Democratic-Delegate-Apportionment-Calculations.pdf]
TNDP BLUE COCKTAIL: MEMPHIS
https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/ [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]
Join us on Thursday, March 26th from 6:00-8:00 PM CT for the TNDP Blue Cocktail Memphis in support of our 2020 candidate recruitment and support program. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward supporting and empowering Democratic candidates in 2020. Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available! Register now! [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-03-06%20at%2011.25.40%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-03-06%20at%2011.26.33%20AM.png]
RALLY WITH TEACHERS, STUDENTS, AND FAMILIES
Join teachers, parents, and public education advocates on Monday, March 16th at the Capitol for a "Rally for Our Schools." This rally will be to remind legislators of their duty and oath to serve public schools and to demand they remember students' and teachers' best interest while making laws. Register now! [http://www.teateachers.org/rally]
YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS IN ACTION
In the wake of the Middle Tennessee Tornado Tragedy, 21 polls across the state were closed. In Davidson County, many polling locations opened late. Thousands of people were unable to cast their ballot as planned, and yet the Secretary of State and Davidson County Election Commission would not expand poll times. This was not okay and would cause irreparable damage to democracy. TNDP filed a lawsuit for injunction to have poll times extended to make up for these delays. We won the lawsuit and kept polls open as late as 10PM. This is the exact work your contributions fund. Your contributions protect Tennessee's right to cast their ballots for Democrats and provide the staff and resources needed to do the work. Will you consider donating today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

| Derek, I couldn't believe what I was hearing. [On Wednesday](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MjImZD1yN3k3eDB1.1rjpsss9oD26fyCrXzDM_tDxchRgyD8i39DAGls7Ubo) Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer lashed out with a disgusting attack on Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh.

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MjQmZD12MW8ydDBr.1Xne7dVPJHa3gG8PMkau5I7B9lwk3aU5nN210ASgJgo)

| What have we heard from New Hampshire Senators Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan? **Crickets.** This is unacceptable. We cannot sit idly by while Chuck Schumer's attacks on the Judicial Branch go uncontested from New Hampshire's U.S. Senators. It's clear: We need to defeat and retire Jeanne Shaheen this November. [**We can only do that with your support.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MjYmZD1kNmY0bDl5.ayenijHM90dakUT-5bw2DIwq4uwXJ60IJjH1wSEXWrU)
We can win big in November in New Hampshire and replace Jeanne Shaheen with a Republican candidate. Whoever our party's nominee is will need a strong NHGOP to secure victory - **[which is why your donation today will be split between the NHGOP and our New Hampshire Senate Republican Nominee Fund on WinRed.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MzAmZD1oM2kwbzVz.I4O9w799KzcNo1CVlgAExxFZSWSmdaAbH4K_XoB1lkQ)** New Hampshire will see UNPRECEDENTED money flooding in from Chuck Schumer and his allies to support Jeanne Shaheen, and [**we need the resources to fight back.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MzQmZD1yNmk1ZTdu.YLwhE2aUDaVn39iVjzOar55jBIPiAmhjHnb1Jxzc20o) If you've donated before you can process your donation with one-click. [**Please consider investing in New Hampshire Victory today.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzcwOTgwNTIxODM1NzYzMjc1JmM9ZTdmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjU2NjU3MzYmZD10OXc5dDFx.0bG2QsMNJVUtsjkoXWD-YLWjleNluieAkCduMUiDOIA)
Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CH9nNWkIDzHZYswQ4PNjygx569C6w8-ST3ohE3fUwBA=/9bQa3RRMHxmoy-eCgKRsFq6BKM5nayMGRSRj2HjdvCQ=) I want to make sure you're getting our updates, Peter. Rita's been traveling across our district for several months now. We don't want you to miss an opportunity to either meet us on the campaign trail or hear about the conversations we're having. We're listening to every voice and we want you to be heard! name: Sarah Bland
subject: ***Important*** Wilson County Convention Date Changed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
***WILSON COUNTY DEMOCRATS***
***WILSON COUNTY DEMOCRATIC PARTY CONVENTION UPDATE***
Due to the devastation caused by the tornado that struck before dawn on Tuesday, 3/3/20, the Wilson County Democratic Party Convention will be rescheduled to Saturday, 3/14/20.
The Convention will take place at the Lebanon-Wilson Chamber of Commerce, 149 Public Square, Lebanon, TN 37087 in the upstairs room. Attend to select representation from the county for each Presidential candidate who has met the threshold set by the TN Delegate Selection Plan. The doors open on Saturday, 3/14 for registration at 11AM. The convention will begin at Noon Central.
Following this convention on 3/14, the Wilson County Democratic Party will send their county selectors to elect delegates, along with all other county selectors to their Congressional District convention on Saturday, 3/21.
Information about becoming a DNC delegate and the rules governing the DNC Delegate Selection Process may be obtained from tndp.org [https://tndp.org/] or by contacting the Wilson County Democratic Party Chair:
Sarah Bland
sarahtimberlakebland@gmail.com

body:
Our election is coming up faster than you think. In fact, on March 15th, we will be only 101 days from Election Day! We’re going to celebrate this milestone by having a Day of Action with canvassing, phone-banking, text-banking, and events | | |
Friend, **** **** **** Our election is coming up faster than you think. In fact, on March 15th, **_we will be only 101 days from Election Day!_** We’re going to celebrate this milestone by having a Day of Action with canvassing, phone-banking, text-banking, and events throughout the district.
But we can’t do any of that without your help. **_Can we count on you to host an event in the district or help out with another event we’re having?_** If so, please reply to this email letting me know how you’d like to get involved!
We’re hoping to have volunteers in every corner of NY-17 getting the word out about our campaign, but that means we need clipboards, campaign lit, snacks, and more for our supporters. **_[Will you chip in what you can today to help us out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2zu/11XPSa9hRjWrb5GZKRsPiw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKToospb7v9FpGIX7GXZDg0wuym2DFToMpKo5evKetlsnMyEIQOT-2B-2BUtn93mk00-2B7oDPSasXJOeGIgeN4xX6C9YVuPEqGtJYs22F-2FeX0dp5sTBU61SdUswJwOuEi6AIFtJhBclVy7o-2BOiiChmNHrE5Ya20HV89kz2c-2B3WVqOmEBNFyA2ZJqETiJ2egqeauG-2FOt2NhrPOvs4zhEk3oQYzFdz1ucxdFQDQ-2FnAn4rk4CxAmQ-3D-3D/gWCx)_**

name: Mike Siegel
subject: I wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15790783/166989920/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTZhMWIzMy1kZjVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myGq05XnCqOT7a1c0A1Zy3XsX-v2PlMhD95YUQixTJE=&emci=dccccc1d-dd5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=b96a1b33-df5f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

**We are doing wonderful things, together.** Not just winning elections — although we had a great result on Tuesday, to be sure! But we are building a community, and a foundation for progressive political change.

**Thank you for being a part of it.** Thank you for contributing to this work to provide real, effective representation to the 800,000 and more people who live in the Texas 10th.

Thank you for helping to raise the funds, for meeting the voters, and for sharing the message of this campaign.

My family is tremendously appreciative of your support for my candidacy and our broader goals.

Thanks to you, on Election Day, we won over 34,000 votes—over 44% of the electorate—leading the race into a runoff even though our two opponents outspent us by over $2 million.

And thanks to you, we’ve accomplished some very good things along the way: from raising awareness of environmental issues like the Fayette Coal Plant, to filing a lawsuit to protect the voting rights of college students across Texas, to registering hundreds of new voters and driving record turnout across the Texas 10th.

**The work is not done, of course, but let’s appreciate all of the good so far. Thank you for being a part of it!**

With love and respect,
Mike
* * *

Maine, Arizona, Colorado, North Carolina — Democrats are defeating Republican Senators in every single one of these states. That’s fantastic news!
We have what it takes to flip the majority, but there’s a catch: **Democrats need to defend incumbents like Tina Smith who are facing tough re-election battles.**
That’s the only way we can end the Republicans’ stranglehold on power in Washington. But it’s going to take a heck of a lot of resources to defend our Democratic incumbents, so we’re asking:
**Can you rush a donation of whatever amount is meaningful to you and help us keep Tina Smith in the Senate? Anything you can give will go a long way in our work to take back the majority.**

name: Team Scholten
subject: What has Steve King been up to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

Rep. Steve King had quite the week last week.

**FIRST** , he went on the floor of the House of Representatives to beg Republican leadership to let him back onto his congressional committees.

After over a year of being the most useless member of Congress, he’s finally feeling ready to get back to work... although he’s still not taking responsibility for his own words and blaming others for the consequences.

**THEN** in commemoration of all of his contributions to society, two comedians put up a tiny statue of Steve King in front of the Iowa Statehouse.

As the plaque reads: “This site is dedicated to Confederate sympathizer and White Nationalist, Steve King. Here, King is honored with the world’s smallest Confederate statue. A tiny statue for a tiny man.”
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15794624/167025435/-1662632620?refcode=em20_200306_icymi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDkzZTU3MS1lYjVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WH_oWwZNyxG4zytotE9lZEI_ZO7ZRw-6ytX2y7H00Lw=)

clean_body: Peter, Rep. Steve King had quite the week last week. FIRST , he went on the floor of the House of Representatives to beg Republican leadership to let him back onto his congressional committees. After over a year of being the most useless member of Congress, he’s finally feeling ready to get back to work... although he’s still not taking responsibility for his own words and blaming others for the consequences. THEN in commemoration of all of his contributions to society, two comedians put up a tiny statue of Steve King in front of the Iowa Statehouse. As the plaque reads: “This site is dedicated to Confederate sympathizer and White Nationalist, Steve King. Here, King is honored with the world’s smallest Confederate statue. A tiny statue for a tiny man.” | = NOW , while these are all fun in principle, it’s high time Iowa’s 4th District has an honorable, decent, and hardworking representative -- not one who puts himself first and can’t get anything done in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking this race seriously. It’s fun to laugh at how outrageous Steve King can be, but it’s time for a change. \--Team Scholten =

body:
Hello Friends, If you believe in protecting the second amendment and would like to take back the House of Representatives, we have a great event coming up. Please join the host committee for a Spring Fling with Tiffany Shedd, Celebration of the Second Amendment Shoot and BBQ Dinner. [ **SIGN UP NOW** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=77251d90087e4f3f9e2fa7193b5bf45d&_e=VKNbZ1zuLP11OxwrzGCZxguX6lX2I3hjj1YlSbbf7zDA9YYC6EQi_yHohIS88h6EZGWjEtKov5VTIGpwdPgSKxXpMBBs7pfSN9ftxtDLkkoJ_Z-HAeYk89j6cQsRUGNuFaS9QJzGidyRKFYKp07BWkLOUChLQaJeuTgffnCig-oq5Ixkh4z6A9QckNiDaUDD326V4m0e4T-cgpXRRROMBprIsMR-Pl3ocNmexYYPumC4Wb_Y62OHSmeEmoBceTcjP9M_ask3rqqXVExqyVfAMRVQS2iPIjI--f8I474gn4SVGf8uBsuqKDNxksDpzpwc9ZTNmvmNFywGPedJjKAK9vi498VBGRRvsf2oxlwXBXY3W0Fl3EOTbtLyTzhS3cX0ifyBw4tS_uqUDc88iTqSBKgTAdsCRaI7h8PDX65sgSNE4bibG5bSGc5X9eZt6nP8) Friends, it's time we win back Arizona’s First Congressional District. President Trump won this district in 2016 but sadly it is held by Democrat Congressman Tom O’Halleran who **voted to impeach the President and has an F rating with Gun Owners of America.** Here is a video you might like to see: **[WATCH THIS](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=77251d90087e4f3f9e2fa7193b5bf45d&_e=VKNbZ1zuLP11OxwrzGCZxjOkV6UY8x6M-7op6U68Tjoc0c6gC7A35Z-3vuZV_TXiY43OGe_LQuqWqo5YkLgDgX9gSDxLtKTnglaX1-YqZB_XSD1HxWB9qgS5V2K7zrNgekqJQ5V5NbPD_ztOfh96pwuUDDl84DtCe04uHwY0cgxrkwzLAfUW4hVPMFGmnL2xKXfyO_d7gSPjM4l-xTq0gUoqEioHjXbNTTUBk2x1fekBRG1K8y9NYjyUotD9VHqQcIipGFHA5_iq5u5jPDxs49KsUxlIL6MKs6LcJwEqDz-9_ZlolJwgFMDYVE5nj4jL)** [ ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=77251d90087e4f3f9e2fa7193b5bf45d&_e=VKNbZ1zuLP11OxwrzGCZxguX6lX2I3hjj1YlSbbf7zDA9YYC6EQi_yHohIS88h6EZGWjEtKov5VTIGpwdPgSKxXpMBBs7pfSN9ftxtDLkkoJ_Z-HAeYk89j6cQsRUGNuFaS9QJzGidyRKFYKp07BWkLOUChLQaJeuTgffnCig-oq5Ixkh4z6A9QckNiDaUDD326V4m0e4T-cgpXRRROMBprIsMR-Pl3ocNmexYYPumBK6Fkd_Uy5Q2KI4WTYhzNxfyBdoKD_Dq7dbp8YiL1xEsEFJQFVemqW3wG-IrKiL9xo4eKtDAnabvFQ__DcEnu-UdOgeDDp9_fOGx8-O93ZQcD540US8M9eQBfG1tJ7p1eFmV3DBog5jGTQk4j7xVBBvFRDs0cDpSyGdDr54RQU7YDLDxIr9vwlDawOLd-JWQcPdg4_iYouwlD542FE2qgw) In case you missed it, here is a recent letter of endorsement sent out from Senator Jon Kyl: "Arizona is blessed with abundant natural resources and good water, if we’re careful with it. But, there aren’t a lot of representatives in Washington with much knowledge about earning a living from the land. Tiffany Shedd and her family are farmers and ranchers in Pinal County. They understand rural Arizona. That’s important for a Member of Congress representing Congressional District One, one of the largest and most diverse districts in the entire country. It’s one of the reasons I support Tiffany in her campaign to represent District One. Tiffany has the background, intellect, tenacity and ability to bring a strong voice for her Constituents to Congress if we elect her in 2020. In addition to helping run her family business, Tiffany earned a law degree from the University of Arizona, which enables her to work with families and businesses from many of the communities in District One. She understands your concerns and is well positioned to represent you in Congress. I used to serve with Bob Stump in the U.S. House of Representatives. He too was a farmer who loved the land, and knew and understood his constituents. Like Bob, Tiffany is conservative, straightforward, sensible and hard working. I’d like to see her representing us in Washington. I hope you will join me in supporting Tiffany Shedd for Congress." -Senator Kyl [ **SIGN UP NOW** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=77251d90087e4f3f9e2fa7193b5bf45d&_e=VKNbZ1zuLP11OxwrzGCZxguX6lX2I3hjj1YlSbbf7zDA9YYC6EQi_yHohIS88h6EZGWjEtKov5VTIGpwdPgSKxXpMBBs7pfSN9ftxtDLkkoJ_Z-HAeYk89j6cQsRUGNuFaS9QJzGidyRKFYKp07BWkLOUChLQaJeuTgffnCig-oq5Ixkh4z6A9QckNiDaUDD326V4m0e4T-cgpXRRROMBsqXy-9ohbQuNdtjDlqKGhn9tPc2nLXyAg2qJ0w-Zlc2yFp2hBqqjDXcAZI60VUB-E_r6HKA1ZWtzz5U009ZGj0DPnTLJStBHL0bdAm0ZOjI_eSEB5ATyTmgVFaLBMwr2TnXBujS8RErufz1O1Z_FGobEsiFVDOx6AFy8xVUOg3kQLPe14oe3u1g67s_xNLlKqefUUgjve6W5GFuGzErj_MwKMm94DqmyfcQP7s3qCwr) We hope to see you there! In case you haven’t heard, earlier this week, Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer directly threatened two U.S. Supreme Court Justices In case you haven’t heard, earlier this week, **Senate Democrat Leader Chuck Schumer directly threatened two U.S. Supreme Court Justices in front of a crowded mob**. Schumer promised that if _Roe v. Wade_ were affected in any way, Justices Kavanaugh and Gorsuch, specifically, would “pay the price” and “won’t know what hit” them. When Democrat members of Congress threaten our Constitution and those responsible for upholding and defending it, our country’s future takes a serious hit. Unfortunately, Kendra Horn and her liberal allies are working to destroy our constitutional principles every day in Congress. Derek --

The path to a Democratic majority in the Senate runs through Virginia. **It is critical that we re-elect Mark if we want to not only keep the seats Democrats currently hold, but win back the majority.**

We're facing a tough fight. The Trump campaign is pouring money and organizers into the Commonwealth, and Mark already faces **six Republican challengers** vying to take his Senate seat. Plus, the DNC officially named Virginia a "battleground" state. We know we have a strong supporter base, and we can't afford to take anything for granted. **We 're getting ready for a full-court press.**

subject: Corky's updates from the campaign trail!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/15c2554672e7010dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Donate Now! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/1a57d21bfbbd46bec3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/adc5190a6eed17d3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Corky Messner Announces Statewide Granite State Conversations Issues Tour**
We’re pleased to announce a series of events statewide aimed at exploring the issues of greatest concern to New Hampshire voters.
“Granite State Conversations with Corky Messner” kicks off Monday, March 30, in Manchester, and will focus on the opioid crisis and homelessness, two challenges facing the Queen City. Joining Corky for the inaugural event will be Republican Victoria Sullivan, a former New Hampshire State Representative and Assistant Majority Leader who ran for Manchester Mayor and challenged Joyce Craig in 2019.
Other stops will soon be announced, as Corky plans to meet with voters in a variety of settings, from town halls to local business visits to roundtable events. Since his campaign launch, Corky has already met with voters at more than 250 town halls, meet-and-greets, speaking engagements and other events. The new tour will build on the connections made with residents throughout New Hampshire.

“I’ve discovered that many voters feel they’re not being represented in Washington, and what they’re most concerned about – the economy, national security, immigration, support for veterans, and other issues – has not been the priority of professional politicians like Jeanne Shaheen.”

Once details are finalized, look for a full schedule of events on our website, **[corkyforsenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/45b08262a1a9813ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**In the News**
Corky was a guest March 1 on WMUR-TV Channel 9’s _Close-Up_ and spoke to host Adam Sexton about pressing issues, including President Trump’s Coronavirus response, recent Senate votes on two GOP-supported abortion bills, and water quality in New Hampshire. Click [**here**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/fa3af3a69b6ceeb9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) to see the interview.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/3c7a81d57142b90cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Coronavirus Response**
We stand by President Trump and his plan to combat this public health threat and we applaud the proactive measures announced by New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu.
Corky also supports recent legislation introduced in the U.S. Senate to safeguard America’s medical supply chain, which relies on medical drugs and devices made in China and other countries. “Over-reliance on foreign-sourced drugs and related materials makes our country vulnerable to potential public health threats when those supplies are threatened, as is the case with the coronavirus,” says Corky. “We must act to keep our medical supply chain safe and provide Granite Staters and all Americans access to needed medicines and medical devices.”
|
---
**Quick Pic**
Corky, shown here with event organizer Christine Benner, recently attended the Sullivan County GOP’s “Leap into Victory” event. Great turnout and a warm welcome!
|
---
**Campaign Notes: Bernie and Biden**
With Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders now leading the Democrat presidential field, we remain convinced that the party of U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen remains out of touch with most Americans, who value individual freedom, economic opportunity, and a strong defense.
We will continue to represent the core beliefs of most Granite Staters, and we will stand strong against these career politicians.
|
---
**Our Prayers are with Nashville**
In light of the devastation caused by recent tornadoes in the Music City, Corky offers his prayers for a quick recovery for this wonderful city and its residents. Whenever there is a natural disaster, Americans will always stand together and work together. Here’s to you, Nashville!
|
---
**Upcoming Events
**
**Meet Corky Messner – Invitation event hosted by Scott Lamprey**
Friday, March 13, 6 - 9pm
1009 Whittier Hwy, Moultonborough

**Speaking Event: Mount Washington Valley GOP Meeting**
Saturday, March 14, 5:30 - 8pm
Lobster Trap, 2840 West Side Rd, North Conway

**Attending: Ganley Luncheon**
Tuesday, March 17, 11am - 1pm
Boys & Girls Club, 3 Geremonty Drive, Salem

**Speaking Event: Sullivan County Republican Committee**
Tuesday, March 17, 6 - 7:30pm
Salt Hill Pub – Newport, 58 Main St, Newport

**SALEM TOWN HALL**
Thursday, March 19, 6:30 - 8pm
Tuscan Kitchen Toscana Room, 67 Main Street, Salem
**[RSVP HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4268b8c46aa3d1c/23ed2acde2f0012ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

**Speaking Event: Greater Hillsborough Republican Town Committee Meeting**
Monday, March 23, 6:30 - 8:30pm
538 W Main St, Hillsborough
|

name: Tina Smith
subject: March
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
My friend — In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our first end-of-quarter fundraising push of this critical election year. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for the quarter and we are only a handful of days into the month. The beginning of March has been pretty terrible for this kind of thing — the weather is looking up, people are planning their summer breaks, and most folks are beginning to tune out. With so much going on in Washington, I need to stay focused on fighting for our progressive values in the Senate and making sure Democrats don't lose this seat (and with it, virtually any chance to flip the majority). But trying to keep Minnesota blue and doing my job to protect our health care, defend reproductive freedom, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and more has left me with very little time to worry about our fundraising goals. The good news is that we're not that far behind where we need to be to end the first quarter of the year in a strong position. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before our weekly check-in on Monday should put us back on track for the FEC deadline. Now, here's the part where I ask for your help: [**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before Monday’s deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focus on all the critical work we have ahead of us. You can donate right here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15798666/167066917/73738441?refcode=em200306-one&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=yes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmU1MzMwOC1mZjVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPKsSkNP7ITBXNfe-iRk7JM0-La0ThS-GUOOPXEvcHM=) | [Chip in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15798667/167066918/73738441?refcode=em200306-one&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=yes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmU1MzMwOC1mZjVmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JPKsSkNP7ITBXNfe-iRk7JM0-La0ThS-GUOOPXEvcHM=)
---
Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work out on the road in Minnesota. Every hard-earned dollar you are able to spare means the world to me.
I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on, and I'm so grateful you are part of the team. Thank you.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: Georgia is the key (breaking Washington Post alert)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
How we take back the Senate
| | |
---
Friend,

I'll be honest with you: I'm in for a tough fight.

**_The_ _Washington Post _just reported that winning here in Georgia is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate - so the GOP is already coming after us. **
My Republican opponent is already spending _millions_ from her own personal fortune to buy this seat - and now a Trump-supporting super PAC has named this race one of its top targets.
Republicans will do _whatever it takes_ to tighten Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate and ensure that GOP senators can keep rubber-stamping every dangerous policy that comes out of Trump's White House.
If we lose in Georgia, Democrats will have no chance at taking back the Senate and holding corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell accountable.
**So, friend, I need to ask for your help. The only way I can win in Georgia and help take back the Senate is if we raise another $10,452 before midnight tonight. But right now, we're falling short, and time is running out.**
**With the future of the Senate and the soul of our democracy at stake, I'm counting on your immediate grassroots donation.

[Please, friend, will you rush $5 or more before midnight _tonight_ to flip Georgia blue so we can take back the Senate for Democrats? Every single dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk99-fr-op&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

subject: I swear I wash my hands
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3938da0f1cfb/i-swear-i-wash-my-hands?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
# **I swear I wash my hands.**

******Last week I got the flu. I told myself that people running for Congress do not have time for the flu, tried to press on -- but the doctors put me on bed rest. I got bronchitis. I lost my voice. **

******Now I’ve been thinking all week about this -- losing my voice. As a candidate, it’s startling how powerless being physically unable to speak has rendered me. It’s been a good reminder (a hard reminder) that we are in this fight for all the people who can’t speak for themselves -- for everyone who has been rendered voiceless by a system that oppresses and maintains a status quo that keeps the rich and powerful rich and powerful and everybody else silent. **

**_But here’s the other thing: me being voiceless has put us behind on our fundraising goals. I can’t call donors. Can’t hustle at events. My amazing team is picking up a lot of slack, but we need your help._ **
**__****We are $4,300 behind where we should be right now.** That means we need 172 of you to make $25 donations.
******If you can make a larger gift, don’t let me stand in your way! And if you can pitch in a smaller amount, that helps, too. ** ****** ** **********This campaign takes all of us. It’s been a good practical reminder for me this week just how true that is. I need each and every one of you -- I cannot do it alone. Can you make a gif** t today?

Click [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ec8fbf8d99&e=140a9b81e7) to make your contribution
**********Thank you (and wash your hands!),** **********Dani**

clean_body: | | | | | | | I swear I wash my hands. ****Last week I got the flu. I told myself that people running for Congress do not have time for the flu, tried to press on -- but the doctors put me on bed rest. I got bronchitis. I lost my voice. ****Now I’ve been thinking all week about this -- losing my voice. As a candidate, it’s startling how powerless being physically unable to speak has rendered me. It’s been a good reminder (a hard reminder) that we are in this fight for all the people who can’t speak for themselves -- for everyone who has been rendered voiceless by a system that oppresses and maintains a status quo that keeps the rich and powerful rich and powerful and everybody else silent. But here’s the other thing: me being voiceless has put us behind on our fundraising goals. I can’t call donors. Can’t hustle at events. My amazing team is picking up a lot of slack, but we need your help. __We are $4,300 behind where we should be right now. That means we need 172 of you to make $25 donations. ****If you can make a larger gift, don’t let me stand in your way! And if you can pitch in a smaller amount, that helps, too. **** ********This campaign takes all of us. It’s been a good practical reminder for me this week just how true that is. I need each and every one of you -- I cannot do it alone. Can you make a gif t today? Click to make your contribution ********Thank you (and wash your hands!), ********Dani | "Chip in now" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'd like to explain something before Trump's next visit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our grassroots campaign to flip a Republican-held Senate seat in Colorado. First, I need to explain why your contribution is so important, especially this week. **Donald Trump announced last night that he 's coming back to Colorado to campaign and fundraise for our opponent, Cory Gardner. This comes just weeks after Gardner voted to acquit the president, and now Trump is attempting to repay the political favor.** Along with all the money and attention Trump's visit will bring is another round of nasty, negative attacks on my character -- right from the GOP playbook we've seen time and again. We have to fight back today. Cory Gardner may have the support of Trump's re-election machine and McConnell's right-wing donor network, but our campaign has something more powerful: lots of grassroots Democrats like you who are standing with us in this critical fight. **So, we 're in the middle of an emergency fundraising drive to raise $250,000 from online donors and I'm personally asking you to step up today. Can I count on you to donate $10 or more before Trump comes back to Colorado?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200305-trump?refcode=em-200306-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

John

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Our nation’s next chapter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team -
I hope you're ready to make some change in this country, because together, we're in a position to write our nation's next chapter. **But we cannot do it without your help.**

A better future is not only possible - it's within reach. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold us back. They're obstructing the Democratic process so that they can keep pushing Trump's hateful, divisive agenda.

I should know - when I ran for governor of Georgia in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced too many voices.
That's why I'm reaching out today: **Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.** In every election up and down the ballot, we can reject the Trump-GOP agenda and flip red states blue, but we cannot do that without the input of dedicated supporters like you. **[Will you take a moment to take our official Democratic Outreach Survey to ensure Democrats can create a winning strategy, flip red states blue and stop the Trump agenda?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTcwNTU1MzgS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDQxMjY1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
**The next elections are about us. They 're our chance to fix what is broken - and to finally kick out those who broke it.**
But to claim victory on Election Day, we have a lot of work to do. We have to reach out to those who do not believe their voices matter and convince them otherwise. Because here's the thing: **Inaction can be contagious, but so can a passion for change. **

With your help, we will register every last voter, get them to the polls and prove to them that elections have the power to change their lives. **But, before we do that, we need your help setting our outreach strategy.**
**[Please Team, can I count on you to take a short survey to help Democrats win important elections across the country?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTcwNTU1MzgS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDQxMjY1OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Team, we can't let this fight pass us by - not after we've seen what the GOP will do to win. Change starts small, but together, I know we can lead this country toward a brighter future for everyone.
Stacey Abrams

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=17055538&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTg0MDQxMjY1OQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDQxMjY1OQS2).

Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Saying Connected
body:
While the changing temperatures seem confused on whether it's still winter or inching toward spring, one thing is for sure -- it's definitely...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/another-week-another-endorsement-469070?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Saying Connected

While the changing temperatures seem confused on whether it's still winter or inching toward spring, one thing is for sure -- it's definitely Lincoln Day Dinner season in Indiana. So far this year, I've had the honor of personally attending Lincoln Days in Washington Township, Vanderburgh County and Pike Township (many more to come), while our team at state party will be represented at every single event.

I absolutely love this time of year -- getting on the road, talking with the Hoosier Republicans, and all-around staying connected. I also love it because it's an opportunity for me to honor some of our hardest-working Hoosier Republicans. While at the Pike Township Lincoln Day Dinner last week, I was honored to present Monica Kozlowski, president of the Indiana Federation of Republican Women, with the Chairman's Award for her work growing our party.

And while Lincoln Day Dinners are a great way for us to stay connected, this week I also launched another new, excited method -- Facebook. If you haven't yet, I'd be honored if you would "like" my new page on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) so that we can continue to stay in touch.

Whether it's on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) or at an upcoming Lincoln Day Dinner (find yours here (http://indiana.gop/events?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ), I hope to see you soon!

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Chairman Kyle Hupfer presents Monica Kozlowski, president of the Indiana Federation of Republican Women, with the Chairman's Award at the Pike Township Lincoln Day Dinner earlier this week!
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Keeping Hoosiers Safe: Coronavirus

Today, Governor Eric Holcomb declared a public health emergency as Indiana has its first presumptive positive case of the coronavirus. The individual is in isolation after being tested last night, and the risk to the general public remains low.

This follows Governor Holcomb briefing cabinet members and agency directors on Indiana's pandemic response control earlier this week.

Given the global spread of the coronavirus, it was always a question of not if, but when a case of the coronavirus would come to Indiana. To help protect yourself from the coronavirus and other respiratory illnesses (like the flu), follow these steps:
* Wash your hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. If soap and water are not available, use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer.
* Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth with unwashed hands.
* Avoid close contact with people who are sick.
* Stay home when you are sick.
* Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash.
* Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces.

Creating More Manufacturing Jobs for Hoosiers

Thanks to Governor Holcomb and strong Republican leadership, Indiana is one of the most business-friendly states in the Midwest and the nation! That's why Fiat Chrysler picked Indiana to diversify its Kokomo manufacturing operations with an investment of nearly $400 million to expand and retool its Indiana Transmission Plant II for production of a new engine. This means more great advanced manufacturing jobs for Hoosiers! Take a look at some of the reasons why Fiat Chrysler is expanding its operations in Indiana:
* No. 1 in the Midwest for business
* No. 5 nationally for business
* No. 1 for government efficiency
* No. 3 for best business regulatory environment
* No. 2 most affordable state

Governor Holcomb is working hard to bring more jobs to Hoosiers throughout the state, and the work he has done to position Indiana on national and global stage is working! Governor Holcomb is dedicated to creating a better Indiana for all Hoosiers and to continue Putting People First.
https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Follow Chairman Hupfer on Social Media!

As the leader of our Indiana Republican Party, Chairman Kyle Hupfer is constantly on the road, doing interviews and sharing news about Indiana and our progress under Republican leadership!

In addition to his very active Twitter profile, he launched a new Facebook page this week. To help stay connected, follow along on both accounts below:

Link to Twitter profile: https://twitter.com/ChairmanHupfer?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Link to Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Join Us at the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention

The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated our website (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c7fb84335&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes:
* Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! More info is available here (http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* Convention Schedule: Check out the official schedule of events for the two-day convention here (http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees here (http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=ccf7e72541&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Upcoming Republican Events

name: Matt G., Campaign Manager
subject: There’s no place for this in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
I’ll get straight to the point.
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=dcab91e198d24d44a441ed19ccaf0002&_e=Ux_CumeuVgVG0gvmTjGa7-04jsk_GbWCArK4UT13DKYJj9yUzyVHgJUWY4YmSxtl5aK4r1DDOkfMnSYvmWeGDAV7k9WSyjoZenjw-ynv3oKH8Dy7MXafRuQVJZK893YaL7g1JQdlK7-Pqw7dTtpCuKWp4IC3qfCCmvAEoQ9jLEr7oF_ylqn_jBqXqVyHS0BVT4xoNQGNvk5AqtVe6PqnaK6EM9t2cxD3cvsHJgzS0nbm-HoUD6_irxWBzCTVPMc8sa1AkqmW91wVhQVnomUW143EcDY7nMUfqcBB_CI6rqAymbzKQ1-k5AWgcmK-XvSD) Friend, I’ll get straight to the point. Any and all efforts to delegitimize the state of Israel must be strongly condemned. Brian has made it clear that there is no room in our politics for the misguided Anti-Israel BDS movement, and we must come together and act swiftly to address this dangerous campaign. [ **REJECT THIS MOVEMENT** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=dcab91e198d24d44a441ed19ccaf0002&_e=Ux_CumeuVgVG0gvmTjGa7-04jsk_GbWCArK4UT13DKYJj9yUzyVHgJUWY4YmSxtl5aK4r1DDOkfMnSYvmWeGDAV7k9WSyjoZenjw-ynv3oJwdFFTGdil1FseaGOBeP9z0YJ7cNGZldBqnVtukuihnkSxUTjLX9a9O8wW2letBj-l8G_6UAkoiSicqa5e-qm1I-dPCX9qdk0KH6MXswMBrNfS5b8vKKrW0Ik6WgnEjKxQKE5zqn_SUUYsgPb24X5dene9vOB92FQwEuKg6TfbxXKxja9CUQrhEa2oIklVe8mKd2A3DT76Wb1iuaoMXe1b) In Congress, Brian has always been committed to finding commonsense solutions to the most complex issues facing our nation and combating anti-Semitism should NEVER fall along party lines. Unjustified attacks against the state of Israel are direct threats to communities here in Pennsylvania and across the country, and I know that Brian will continue to fight for legislation that denounces discrimination of all types in our country. **[Please sign our petition today to show you are committed to putting an end to Anti-Semitic rhetoric in America. ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=dcab91e198d24d44a441ed19ccaf0002&_e=Ux_CumeuVgVG0gvmTjGa7-04jsk_GbWCArK4UT13DKYJj9yUzyVHgJUWY4YmSxtl5aK4r1DDOkfMnSYvmWeGDAV7k9WSyjoZenjw-ynv3oL_iq1gdYC-lTKXqNBp0VDMvIQyKcir78LE8-Fy_wZ5Xr5nVpZwWiIgFBf5rW_kFk8rPKhF_mBuTGl8T2zrxG-uD1oYfnzZ3GJFCTaUmeauSsLb9iAtsm2r6Pb8asGWEpscRtmmQV_2Bb7qpbcCj_QkL3WIS2FMqcp63eAe393o7UgyoLluLq3BMgJuaFIRvdXhGqXXHgJiYG7KhcImVRw0)** [ **SIGN OUR PETITION** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=dcab91e198d24d44a441ed19ccaf0002&_e=Ux_CumeuVgVG0gvmTjGa7-04jsk_GbWCArK4UT13DKYJj9yUzyVHgJUWY4YmSxtl5aK4r1DDOkfMnSYvmWeGDAV7k9WSyjoZenjw-ynv3oLJ_6ilH7G9hbAgl-LMntsqYvHIeATvbEaxqg6W6xWpv5HPUm5-Xi7Mj1HHDdviuDw_0uSNMzn-cH8UD3tXQt0fBJRc6uNF5zmSiqsszyHYoLeU_vLx64nSoziI2E5gfblufyJi4qp_4996M8cc70IJnN6T7GAZCD3Dq_DuyB--Bme4-iru1N55zihHULv7sm9bJYplDYjg_HpVWxGCTPI3) Thank you, Matt G. clean_body: I’ll get straight to the point. Friend, I’ll get straight to the point. Any and all efforts to delegitimize the state of Israel must be strongly condemned. Brian has made it clear that there is no room in our politics for the misguided Anti-Israel BDS movement, and we must come together and act swiftly to address this dangerous campaign. In Congress, Brian has always been committed to finding commonsense solutions to the most complex issues facing our nation and combating anti-Semitism should NEVER fall along party lines. Unjustified attacks against the state of Israel are direct threats to communities here in Pennsylvania and across the country, and I know that Brian will continue to fight for legislation that denounces discrimination of all types in our country. Thank you, Matt G. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Job Growth Smashes Expectations for February as Unemployment Falls Back to 3.5% | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8101fcf3fa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Job Growth Smashes Expectations for February as Unemployment Falls Back to 3.5%**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a82f2b8ea&e=3ee4985eea)
**-** CNBC
The Trump Economy defied “expert” predictions yet again, adding 273,000 new jobs last month—far above the 175,000 expected. America’s unemployment rate fell once again to 3.5 percent, matching its lowest level in more than 50 years, Jeff Cox reports.

**🇺🇸****More:**[Fewer Americans now view China as the world’s top economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3460b1821&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Signs $8.3B Coronavirus Spending Bill**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29ae448dd8&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump signed an $8.3 billion spending bill Friday aimed at fighting the coronavirus outbreak, the culmination of a bipartisan effort by Congress and the White House to provide funds to federal agencies, as well as state and local governments, to battle the disease,” Tyler Olson reports.

**VP Pence:** [President’s top priority is Americans’ health and safety](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e4ce11feb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Surgeon General: Be Cautious, But Not Afraid of Coronavirus**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56f445ebe8&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“It is clear we must continue to help Americans understand how to protect themselves, but also that we mustn't recreate the wheel,” Surgeon General Jerome Adams writes. “We've been through this before and no place in the world is better prepared to handle this challenge. Let's turn fear into actions that will help us all stay safe.”
---
|
---
| [**Kim Kardashian Returns to Oval Office to Back Trump Prison Releases**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13da0b7c0d&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Kim Kardashian West returned on Wednesday to the Oval Office to support President Trump’s decision to release three women from prison,” Steven Nelson reports. The President presented the three mothers with signed copies of their clemency documents.

**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump meets with clemency recipients and Kim Kardashian West](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afa5cff6d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Defense Secretary: ‘This is Our Chance to Bring Troops Home from Afghanistan for Good’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=483581aed6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
Last weekend, “we achieved a promising milestone to bring the war in Afghanistan to a responsible end with the signing of an agreement between the United States and the Taliban,” Defense Secretary Mark Esper writes. “Thanks to President Trump’s leadership, it is the best chance we have ever had to end this conflict.”

** President Trump: **[We’re bringing our troops home](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45b40ebb72&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5014170365&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2b0f988c0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a4dcfda4e9)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Team Christy
subject: Less than 10 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:

| | Peter --

The results are in, and this is what we're looking at for our run-off:

**WHO:** Mike Garcia, who promises to be a puppet for President Trump. He has supported raising our taxes to fund giveaways to multinational corporations while refusing to pay his own, limiting access to reproductive care, and slashing Medicare benefits for seniors. He's now running around claiming Christy wants to "destroy America."

**WHEN:** The primary run-off is on May 12th, less than 10 weeks away.

In 2018, voters indicated that they're ready for a change, and that feeling hasn't gone away. That's why we need to make sure Christy has the resources to reach them and win this thing.

The national Republicans and their special interest backers are just itching for their first chance to flip a California Democratic seat in a decade. It's up to us to stop them.

**[We need to raise $20,000 online by midnight to get to a good place as we start our sprint to the run-off election. subject: Another Watkins scandal. What's next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e56ce4d82e62/its-time-to-run-to-the-fight-6267649?e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| | | In case you missed it, Politico reported this morning on yet another scandal caused by our 2nd district Congressman, Steve Watkins. This makes the third active investigation into the questionable behavior of our state Representative, and it has us all wondering.. what is next?

Do we want someone representing us who can focus on fighting for Kansans and President Trump's agenda or someone distracted by his own mistakes and fundraising to pay his legal bills?

Read the full article here:
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=497165f09f&e=1050d051da)
---
| The Kansas City Star also reported on the investigation this morning:

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=577c8d4feb&e=1050d051da)
---
| These kinds of investigations do not reflect well on our current Congressman and leave him very vulnerable to defeat by the Democrats if we choose him as our Republican nominee in August.

Will you contribute [$100, $50, or even $25 to back the candidate who can defeat the Democrats in August?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1434b1d792&e=1050d051da) This will do more for the effort to elect Jake LaTurner to Congress than you know.

name: Preston, MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: A look back at this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I wanted to take you through some highlights of this campaign.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902bf/7f51f7bc/4db5bb94/4ef18958/2481264445/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey, Peter,

I wanted to take you through some highlights of this campaign. **[But before I give you a rundown of everything we've accomplished so far, can you take a moment and make a donation to help us continue to power through the runoff and take on Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902bf/7f51f7bc/4db5bb94/4ef1895f/2481264445/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200306.2nd__1039__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**FIRST:** MJ was able to build this super-strong campaign only because of your help. Over 35,000 donors contributed to the campaign and helped us hire staff and establish ourselves as a grassroots campaign that won't take a cent from corporate PACs.

**THEN:** We got MJ's message out there, traveling tens of thousands of miles to connect with voters from all walks of life. We put up ads in markets across the state to reach even more Texans, and it worked! MJ came in first in the primary, beating all her competitors.

**NOW:** We're relying on you to help us win the runoff. MJ is **clearly the best candidate** to take on and **BEAT** Sen. Cornyn in November, so let's get her out there to take him on. **[Donating today will help MJ reach voters across Texas and share her message of a Senate that works for us -- not the special interests.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902bf/7f51f7bc/4db5bb94/4ef1895f/2481264445/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200306.2nd__1039__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

What's **next**? We only have a few hours until the end of our **$75,000 Post Primary Goal** , and your help will put us one step closer to **beating Sen. Cornyn in November. [Donate now to put MJ in the best position -- not just for this runoff, but also to take down Sen. Cornyn this November >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902bf/7f51f7bc/4db5bb94/4ef1895f/2481264445/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200306.2nd__1039__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\-- Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902bf/7f51f7bc/4db5bb94/4ef1895f/2481264445/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200306.2nd__1039__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

body:
Did you see Debbie's note?

With the election coming up fast and so much at stake, we want to know your opinion on the best strategy to make sure Democrats win in November.

**[Click here to take the survey and let us know what you think->](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/strategy-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+take+the+survey+and+let+us&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2")

_\----Begin Forwarded Message----_**

[**Click here to take our 2020 Strategy Survey and let me know what issues you think Democrats should focus on to win in November ->**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/strategy-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+take+our+2020+Strategy+Sur&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2")

* * *

In November, our democracy is on the ballot, and Democrats need to win.

If we don't, Republicans will be able to gerrymander districts, and Trump's attacks on our democracy will continue.

That's why I want to get your opinion on what are the best issues to highlight in order to turn out voters across the country and win.

[**Let me know what you think is the best plan to win in November. Click here to take our 2020 Strategy Survey ->**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/strategy-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+Let+me+know+what+you+think+is+the+best+p&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2")

[Take our survey](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/strategy-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Take+our+survey&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200305_1_2")
I appreciate and value your opinion.

Debbie
