subject: Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
** Weekly Update
------------------------------------------------------------
>From Billings to Missoula, Team Downing has been traveling across the State talking to voters about the issues affecting their lives. Time and time again, we hear from Montanans about the growing cost of prescription drugs and the need for price transparency in healthcare.
Troy Downing has the experience and the courage to tackle these issues head on.
Please Consider Donating Now to the Troy Downing Campaign!

============================================================
** DONATE NOW (https://secure.anedot.com/troy-downing-for-montana/donate)

Heather and Troy got a tour of ** Montana Resources (https://www.facebook.com/montanaresources/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARDS5a9s_z5K7LLULMt0S-lsevEtmoH82GZcjJgrvgxQuBCTUQUbAxV1C6Z4ZHzxeNrBP1t2k7MmkYMz&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDIiefRKiUAR0hn7bTDL_B-KZjUPenXNvuANKMuztjRbXHRxah0ZSMI3TIOzyGh1gfSbNNATEbD7-m5oAVKe63DgMCIAFNUnv-bKPlvWEuKPlX0NL9QKO7j6Cl6gyVf_WZvvTF2Sf1aN8ajsMUyr6KF6Ko3Gd7qbZhrhOvWMXYL5ug8ofBv0aiQQpH9wA2QlSokAHkcux5Zi9vVhkJNMHeO9Adow8ukzPTkNchq8LITHaob3PhLVUB38602LdbcCRjHgZ42Lh4WTbE-87xJl9k5ixNQhtzd6IIqAiUQjKILvQHQxDybGhlOL8kNMeABuPIbxTGqxnQT6BIwt0eVwp33bD7w)
and the copper mines.

The mine was just recognized for 10 years of workplace safety. High risk jobs drive workmans comp insurance premiums higher. Happy to see them implement programs to promote a safe work environment.
Troy spoke to a large crowd at a candidate forum in Dillon.
Troy caught up with Jamie Siminoff, Founder and Chief Inventor of Ring at the ** MSU Jake Jabs College of Business & Entrepreneurship (https://www.facebook.com/MontanaStateCOB/?__tn__=K-R&eid=ARBeElKeNoKDQhfFTUiiZ4BXCcYPtOI-rMYGNGk711cR_6PL845g34CkceBwqTL1aK-pFYJtunH7N4EO&fref=mentions&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARBO6qaT_nbQmI3nvg7XoJ9y5ktXbyDGhDNEXwjYKLBfPY5q_CWrxns0Z7WmyMMqicypR3WKDG_F5jPRNtZYgt6IZkDmIERXCTq3JB9zeBLH4hoacA0O4NLvT4OHuJDYARqGc5SteQohmbKeUMcP2uL5CZAsmkSL8ib8NGaJ-8YjA44sFoGTtc0P1rdiiMCpGQ9OousoqRQ8QdwAjWpgtXKFxvcAlIpDr_BW30yR_bffZOW9w3JML17KkSP9-VmhUCd4z3ZIu8penBKoGjleKSVGjJ8d9Va5mMxlfsIMivn_h5pHp3uG5SZ0WKFVn3yY5E9nsY-tNQtDqZNU6iKXWv3uKU9zoLxuqneRV64OhKxI7p946gpGvB2LXbC4EQ7yb5Tsa2PNDFgKGHxceKqG5_MnKTAunjaNOVYmBvRNDqkVJGMZ1fg)
Team Downing hosted a Meet & Greet in Butte
Troy met with Matthew at Big Sky Collision Center in Billings to talk about Montana's insurance industry.
PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
Copyright © 2020 Troy Downing for Montana All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 6668 Bozeman, MT 59771

name: Bill Weld
subject: The need for an alternative doesn’t end this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23MN5-4bGA05v91SDiR0vFTREASeO7OSp5LDs6xjHisEoDX6bu1veGXPSDLUuCbQlg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=1) Hey Team — When I entered this race, I knew the odds. Challenging an incumbent President, let alone a narcissist whose ego is holding the Republican Party hostage, isn’t easy. [**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=2) For all of the people who wonder why I’m doing it, the answer is simple: because _the American people deserve to have a candidate who will fight for accountability and the rule of law._[**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=3) What did we learn on Tuesday? That a significant number of conservatives throughout the nation are looking for an alternative to this disastrous President. In fact, voters rejected President Trump to the tune of:
* 12% in Massachusetts
* 12% in Utah
* 13% in Vermont

Our job isn’t over. As we continue to grow our movement and draw new, concerned voters into the fold, we’ll continue to push our message of fiscal conservatism, self-reliance, and belief in the American electorate to make the right choice.[****](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=4) | | [CHIP IN NOW →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23MN5-4bGA05v91SDiR0vFTREASeO7OSp5LDs6xjHisEoDX6bu1veGXPSDLUuCbQlg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=5)
---
I’m thankful for your support, and I hope that you’ll continue to stand with me as we fight to take back the Republican Party.[**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200306_frs&n=6)
\-- Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
